data.description:
A race condition bug (fixed in a09a8428) was caused by an unawaited async call in terminal-manager.ts. The existing ESLint config has no type-aware typescript-eslint rules, so this went undetected.

Enable @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises as an error-level rule across all src/**/*.ts and src/**/*.tsx files. Add typescript-eslint with type-checked linting (parserOptions.project pointing to tsconfig.json). Fix or explicitly void-annotate all existing violations. Ensure bun run lint passes cleanly. Verify no performance regression from type-aware linting.
